summary: Dashboard error state displays correctly with proper content sections and navigation, but uses generic UI palette instead of the required diner aesthetic. Core functionality and state contract are preserved.

violations.description: Dashboard uses neutral gray/beige backgrounds instead of required diner palette surfaces (teal #9fd8d2 or cream #fff8ea)
Signed-in app chrome uses generic styling that bleeds away from the required diner brand treatment

actions: Apply diner palette backgrounds to dashboard containers
Update authenticated UI to use brand-consistent color scheme
Ensure visual continuity between public marketing and logged-in surfaces
